name: Salesforce Agentforce
arrSource: Salesforce Q4 FY26 earnings — Agentforce ACV component of $2.9B AI+Data line

arrClaimedVsReal.realNote: Real GenAI ~$250-350M (rest is Data Cloud, Informatica, legacy Einstein); ~50% of 29K deals free/seeded.

narrative.claimed: $800M Agentforce ARR (within $2.9B "AI+Data" that includes Informatica acquisition)
narrative.usage: ~50% of 29K deals are free/seeded. COGS test: inference cost est. $6-12M/yr on $800M = 98%+ "AI margin"
narrative.real: ~$250-350M real GenAI (rest is Data Cloud, Informatica, legacy Einstein)
narrative.flags: $2.9B bundles Informatica ($1.5B acq.) + Data 360 + Agentforce. Gross margin flat at 77% = minimal AI COGS. AWU metric criticized as vanity metric. <2% of $41.5B revenue.
